title: Set up Vitest testing framework for monorepo
description:
Configure Vitest for the npm workspace monorepo. Set up vitest.config.ts at root and per-package configs for @organize/api and @organize/shared. Include test scripts in package.json. Verify the framework runs with a trivial passing test in each package.

Acceptance criteria:
- vitest installed and configured for api and shared packages
- `npm test` runs tests across all workspaces
- One passing smoke test per package

Dev Lead.notes: Vitest framework set up correctly. Tests pass. Unblocks API test coverage.
